evals.prompt: 帮我查最近两周 Se-Cd-iron plaque 水稻方向的新论文，给我周报。
evals.expected_output: A Chinese weekly radar report with verified recent sources, ranked findings, main-line vs adjacent labels, scores, top picks, research ideas, and reading queue. It should prioritize rice Se-Cd-Fe iron plaque work and avoid drifting into unrelated plant molecular biology or food processing.

evals.prompt: 深挖一篇 SynCom 降镉促生水稻论文，转成我的实验设计启发。
evals.expected_output: A paper deep dive that explains the SynCom design, experimental system, indicators, limitations, transfer path to Se-Cd-Fe iron plaque rice research, proposed treatments, mandatory measurements, and fallback options.

evals.prompt: 围绕 DGT/DCB/Se 形态帮我设计一篇数据文章的变量提取框架。
evals.expected_output: A variable extraction framework with inclusion/exclusion criteria, fields for Se dose/form, DGT, DCB, BCR or Se fractionation, pH/Eh, Fe indicators, grain Se/Cd/As, yield, water management, derived outcomes, and quality-control rules.
